productName: Legacy Truffles - DOH Compliant - Double Truffle - Larry Bird Kush - 1g
description: These hybrid moon rocks take Larry Bird Kush to another orbit — bud, oil, and kief layered together for a rich, slow-burning, top-of-the-menu treat. Break it up, take it slow — with notes of apricot, earthy, and grape, with a versatile, anytime balance.
